creator: rgrimes@FreeBSD.org
text: I would love to see this work continue, as eventually it would be possible to boot Linux or FreeBSD from a zfs pool using boot environments, and well, that would just be really really nice for those of us that work in both environments.  Right now I do several dual boot systems and being able to toss the complexity that brings and just using the wonderful FreeBSD loader would be *GRAND*.
